standing.cookingFor: One person. Portions run a little bigger so lunch or dinner is often last night's leftovers.
avoid: Lots of raw tomato (small amounts of cherry tomato are fine)
Heavy Indian-style spice blends (cumin, coriander, chili-forward)
standing.note: Not dairy or gluten intolerant — normal dairy and gluten are fine. Every dish is 25 minutes or less. A small side salad most days, alongside the main.

timing.reason: After the gym — protein-forward to help recovery.
The biggest meal of the day.
Optional — only if dinner is landing later than 20:30.
Light, and clear of midnight sleep by 3 hours.
